blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.3 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,903 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
